title: DCP Protection for Task-Created Child Sessions
test_framework: bun:test (expected in both upstream TypeScript repositories; Phase 0 must pin and confirm)
test_command: bun test (run separately in pinned OpenCode and opencode-dynamic-context-pruning source roots; exact package-scoped commands recorded by Phase 0)
pipeline_rationale: This changes production core permissions, plugin persistence/concurrency, shared global configuration, and context-integrity enforcement across two source owners. Data-loss, security, runaway-cost, migration, and reentrancy risks require independent plan review, RED tests, implementation, test running, validation, and documentation.

skipped_stage_candidates.reason: Skip only if Stage 2 reports no threshold-triggering ambiguity or major rewrite; otherwise run once.
Skip only if Stage 7 finds no major issue, behavior-changing correction, or unresolved validation ambiguity; otherwise run once.

summary: Remove the blanket Task-child compression denial, make DCP state session-aware, cap all active exact model keys at 150K, and add safe enforcement plus Conductor pre-140K containment.
risks: Lossy or partial compression can corrupt context or discard evidence.
Concurrent hooks can cross-contaminate child state or overwrite newer state.
Permission changes can accidentally bypass explicit security denials.
dependencies: Pinned anomalyco/opencode source revision and ownership decision
Pinned Opencode-DCP/opencode-dynamic-context-pruning source revision and ownership decision
blocking: 0.1 DEFERRED: RCA aggregates need message/part content columns (no-content rule); requires user-approved content-access waiver or redefined metadata-only acceptance to resume.

5.2 DEFERRED/WAIVED: OpenCode full-suite literal all(exit_code==0) cannot be satisfied in this sandbox (pre-existing env: symlink limits, no Zed, instruction-file env, live-subprocess bootstrap); DCP is 123/0 green and 0 changed-module regressions. Future env required to lift the waiver.
deliverables: OpenCode core child compression permission policy and tests
DCP per-session state registry, persistence, enforcement, telemetry, and tests
Exact active-model 150K cap inventory and configuration
Conductor pre-140K child-session guardrail and bounded-stage workflow
validationCriteria: Current child-session failure reproduced in RED tests
Concurrent and nested session isolation tests pass
Exact active model key set has 150000 caps
Guardrail and enforcement tests are non-destructive
